title: Planned maintenance impact on user jobs
difficulty_justification: User asks about maintenance impact — requires only reading the facility layout or maintenance notice docs, no telemetry access.
query_text: Is there any planned maintenance or current cooling issue that might cause my jobs to be preempted or delayed today?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Yes, there is an active cooling issue today. Row C (high-density GPU racks R-C04 and R-C05) is experiencing a cooling alarm due to a degraded CRAC unit. Nodes in row C (node201–node208) may be drained by the sysadmin team as a precautionary measure. If your jobs are running on the gpu_dense partition, they may be requeued. Check with the helpdesk or monitor the system status page for updates.

checkpoints.description: Agent reads facility docs rather than BMS data.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace uses docs tool, not facility.query_rack_thermal_alarms
final_answer mentions possible preemption or drain of GPU nodes
